posts.author: Airfkimo_TT (LIN)
posts.cookedHtml:
How can I sort and tag status the jobs item which assigned to me on different board?
there are many job item, i want to give them the tag of Urgent, when possible, Finish.
we need the function, i can’t find it.

The work is spread over different projects, some I can’t edit, some I can.
how can I assemble these job items and add an importance label and appear on a board?

for example, our team want the dashboar like this from all the doshboard.
then everyone can arrange their own work schedule.

image821×544 33.4 KB

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Airfkimo_TT

I’d be happy to help with this but would be much easier if we can set up a zoom so we can share screens and have a full conversation around it

Please use the below link to grab a time with me and we can go through it together.

Chat with Peta

Thanks and kind regards,
Peta - Account Executive at upstream

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Airfkimo_TT! Just hopping in here to see if you were able to find a good solution for this! If not, shoot us a message at support@monday.com and we’d be happy to assist further with this!
